translated_text: 成本函数（或剩余成本函数）
柯布-道格拉斯生产函数
令人不快的货币主义算术
佩龙-弗罗贝尼乌斯定理

CCDF

(Note: CCDF stands for "Complementary Cumulative Distribution Function" and is typically kept as an acronym in Chinese technical texts as well, though it can also be written as 互补累积分布函数 if a full translation is needed.)
柯尔莫哥罗夫-斯米尔诺夫检验
非平稳单变量时间序列

SSR

(Note: SSR in statistics typically refers to "Sum of Squares due to Regression" - 回归平方和, but as an acronym it is often kept as "SSR" in Chinese statistical texts as well.)
